untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 2+ consecutive gap days with accelerating magnitude—a multi-bar pattern condition. Available indicators lack native gap detection and sequential bar analysis. The `returns` metric approximates single-bar gap moves (>1.2%), but cannot verify minimum 2 consecutive gaps or acceleration pattern without custom gap detection logic.
translation_notes: Approximated gap detection using returns >1.2% and volume confirmation. price_pos_20 (Donchian position) used as proxy for 'within 15% of range extremes'. Direction set CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to preserve long/short logic. Exit conditions use hard stops (3% adverse) and profit targets (10-12% reversal). Hold period capped at 10 days. NOTE: A production backtest should implement native gap detection to properly validate consecutive gap acceleration.
